com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.devicemanager

Interface DeviceManager

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Module

    public interface DeviceManager
extends Module
    Provides device info related operations.

    How to get this module:

         DeviceManager deviceManager = (DeviceManager)NSDKModuleManagerImpl.getInstance().getModule(ModuleType.DEVICE_MANAGER);

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Deprecated Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void enableRadarAndHeater(boolean isRadarEnable, boolean isHeaterEnable)
      Enables/Disables radar and heater function.
      AntiRemovalStatus getAntiRemovalStatus()
      Gets the anti-removal status of the current device.
      DeviceInfo getDeviceInfo()
      Gets device information.
      EthernetMode getEthernetMode()
      Gets ethernet mode.
      java.util.List<java.lang.String> getNonDeletableAppList(Context context)
      Gets Non-deletable application list.
      java.util.Date getPOSDate()
      Gets POS datetime.
      java.lang.String getSDKVersion()
      Gets NSDK version.
      TamperReason[] getTamperReason()
      Gets the tamper reason.
      TamperStatus getTamperStatus()
      Deprecated. 
      This method can be replaced by getTamperStatuses().
      TamperStatus[] getTamperStatuses()
      Gets all the tamper status occurred.
      boolean isExistSecurityModule()
      Checks if the device has security module.
      void setAntiRemovalStatus(AntiRemovalStatus status)
      Sets the anti-removal status to the current device.
      void setEthernetMode(EthernetMode mode)
      Sets ethernet mode.
      void setKeyVolume(boolean isOpen)
      Sets the volume of physical keyboard supported by devices like P300.
      void setPOSDate(java.util.Date date)
      Sets POS datetime.
      void setRadarDetectionDistance(RadarGain radarGain, int delta)
      To set the U2000 radar detection distance with the gain and delta parameters.

    • Method Detail

      • getDeviceInfo

        DeviceInfo getDeviceInfo()
                  throws NSDKException
        Gets device information.
        Returns:
        Current device information. See DeviceInfo
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • getPOSDate

        java.util.Date getPOSDate()
                   throws NSDKException
        Gets POS datetime.
        Returns:
        POS datetime.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • setPOSDate

        void setPOSDate(java.util.Date date)
         throws NSDKException
        Sets POS datetime.
        Parameters:
        date - [Required] POS datetime.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • getSDKVersion

        java.lang.String getSDKVersion()
        Gets NSDK version.
        Returns:
        NSDK version.

      • isExistSecurityModule

        boolean isExistSecurityModule()
        Checks if the device has security module.
        Returns:
        "true" if yes, "false" if no.

      • getTamperStatus

        TamperStatus getTamperStatus()
                      throws NSDKException
        Deprecated. This method can be replaced by getTamperStatuses().
        Gets tamper status.
        Returns:
        Tamper status, see TamperStatus.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • getTamperStatuses

        TamperStatus[] getTamperStatuses()
                          throws NSDKException
        Gets all the tamper status occurred.
        Returns:
        All the tamper status occurred. See TamperStatus
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • getNonDeletableAppList

        java.util.List<java.lang.String> getNonDeletableAppList(Context context)
                                                 throws NSDKException
        Gets Non-deletable application list.
        Parameters:
        context - [Required] The context for CertificationInfo and PackageManager to use..
        Returns:
        The list of non-deletable applications.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • setKeyVolume

        void setKeyVolume(boolean isOpen)
           throws NSDKException
        Sets the volume of physical keyboard supported by devices like P300.
        Parameters:
        isOpen - [Required] The volume state of physical keyboard. "true" is open ,"false" is close.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • setRadarDetectionDistance

        void setRadarDetectionDistance(RadarGain radarGain,
                               int delta)
                        throws NSDKException
        To set the U2000 radar detection distance with the gain and delta parameters.
        Parameters:
        radarGain - [Required] The microwave radar gain whose default is 0x2B. The smaller gain has farther detection distance.
        delta - [Required] The microwave radar distance parameter whose default configuration is 26, and range from 15 to 1022.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • enableRadarAndHeater

        void enableRadarAndHeater(boolean isRadarEnable,
                          boolean isHeaterEnable)
                   throws NSDKException
        Enables/Disables radar and heater function.
        Parameters:
        isRadarEnable - [Required] Whether to enable radar function or not.
        isHeaterEnable - [Required] Whether to enable heater function or not.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • getTamperReason

        TamperReason[] getTamperReason()
                        throws NSDKException
        Gets the tamper reason.
        Returns:
        The tamper reason, details see TamperReason. With no tamper triggered, this interface will return TamperReason.NONE.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • getAntiRemovalStatus

        AntiRemovalStatus getAntiRemovalStatus()
                                throws NSDKException
        Gets the anti-removal status of the current device.
        Returns:
        The anti-removal status of the current device. See AntiRemovalStatus.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • setAntiRemovalStatus

        void setAntiRemovalStatus(AntiRemovalStatus status)
                   throws NSDKException
        Sets the anti-removal status to the current device.

        Note: On the supported device, the initial anti-removal status is AntiRemovalStatus.ARMED. And if was triggered to the AntiRemovalStatus.LOCKED by outer factors, you can set AntiRemovalStatus.ARMED to reset it.

        Parameters:
        status - [Required] The anti-removal status set to device. See AntiRemovalStatus.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • setEthernetMode

        void setEthernetMode(EthernetMode mode)
              throws NSDKException
        Sets ethernet mode.

        Note: If the current device is not support setting ethernet mode, it will throw an exception.

        The changes will be only valid when the usb port is not inserted.

        Parameters:
        mode - [Required] The ethernet mode to be set, see EthernetMode.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • getEthernetMode

        EthernetMode getEthernetMode()
                      throws NSDKException
        Gets ethernet mode.
        Returns:
        The current ethernet mode, see EthernetMode. If device is not support setting ethernet mode, it will return EthernetMode.NON_CONFIGURABLE.
        Throws:
        NSDKException
